training.hardware: GitHub-hosted 4-vCPU Linux runner using pinned CPU software

reproducibility.scope: Exact byte identity was required by the workflow on the pinned runner and software environment; cross-hardware byte identity is not claimed.

evaluation.criticalRegressionAssessment: Not broad enough for champion eligibility; aggregate language-model loss does not establish behavioral accuracy, safety, calibration or transfer.

promotionDecision.reason: It produced real reproducible weights and reduced loss by 32.70% on its independent ten-example hidden split, but the 0.5B base is not the planned Qwen3-4B model and the evaluation does not establish broad behavioral transfer or absence of critical regressions.
promotionDecision.rollback: Do not load or delete the adapter; the frozen base model remains unchanged.

nextExperiment.objective: Evaluate generated responses on a larger sealed adversarial test and train the registered Qwen3-4B candidate on GPU when sufficient licensed data and compute are available.
